creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
When reviewing this change I should have spent more time on the
pkg_info bit, sorry. :-/  I've attached a very slightly modified
version of the show.c patch. I cut one tab from the output, which
(just!) prevents the SHA256 line from wrapping in an 80 column screen.
I also added a newline after each distfile block, which helps a lot
for packages that have a lot of distfiles. I suggest checking the
output for shells/bash to get an idea of what I mean.

I'm not overly emotional about either of these issues, so I won't
object if the changes are not accepted, but I think they improve
things slightly.

Thanks again Wesley for all your hard work on this,

Doug

-- 

    This .signature sanitized for your protection
